stories.title: The Hormuz blockade: Why a fragile ceasefire may not lower global oil prices
stories.summary: Brent crude has surged to $125 per barrel due to escalating West Asia conflict and severe disruption at the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil chokepoint. Naval tensions and tanker blockades have restricted nearly one-fifth of global oil flows, intensifying supply fears and pushing shipping costs higher. Ceasefire talks remain fragile, while OPEC fragmentation and the UAE’s exit add further uncertainty. Major importers like India and China are diversifying supply, but sustained high prices are fueling global inflation risks, recession concerns, and economic instability. Outlook remains highly volatile, with prices potentially staying elevated without a lasting geopolitical resolution.

stories.title: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as brother fears she is dying
stories.summary: Her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.

stories.title: Two US service members reported missing in Morocco, officials say
stories.summary: A search and rescue operation is underway for the service members, who are believed to have been involved in an accident, according to authorities.

stories.title: Man charged with murder and sexual assault of 5-year-old Australian girl
stories.summary: The girl's death sparked an outbreak of violence in the central Australian town from where she disappeared.

stories.title: 'If we sleep, they bite': Rats and weasels infest camps for displaced Gazans
stories.summary: In the Gaza Strip, the daily battles are now with rats, weasels, and other pests spreading diseases.

stories.title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
stories.summary: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

stories.title: Oil tanker hijacked off coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia
stories.summary: It is the second time an oil tanker has been hijacked in the area in the past 10 days.

stories.title: US Supreme Court asked to restore abortion pill access
stories.summary: A lower court has limited mail-order access to the abortion pill mifepristone, which the drug's maker says will cause "irreparable harm".

stories.title: Cuba condemns new US sanctions as 'illegal' and 'abusive'
stories.summary: The new measures come on top of a US blockade of oil to Cuba that has caused widespread blackouts and fuel shortages.

stories.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
stories.summary: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.

stories.title: Who shot a Secret Service officer at the Trump press dinner?
stories.summary: Court papers do not explicitly accuse the suspect of shooting the officer, even as officials say it was not "friendly fire".

stories.title: Trump claims other presidents flouted war powers law. It's a mixed record
stories.summary: Both Bushes and Reagan won authorisation for wars, but Obama and Clinton ducked the requirement.

stories.title: Ex-F1 driver and Paralympic champion Zanardi dies
stories.summary: Former Formula 1 driver and Paralympic champion Alex Zanardi dies at the age of 59.

stories.title: Three die on Atlantic cruise ship from suspected hantavirus: WHO
stories.summary: The outbreak occurred on the MV Hondius, travelling from Ushuaia in Argentina to Cape Verde

stories.title: Ahead of Misri’s expected Nepal visit, Kathmandu expresses concern to India, China on Kailash yatra over Lipulekh
stories.summary: Nepal reiterates territorial claim to Lipulekh Pass, flags concerns over Kailash Manasarovar Yatra; India says the border pass has been long standing route for the yatra since 1954; it is unclear whether the Foreign Secretary will get to meet Nepal PM during the visit originally slated for May 11-12

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: Iran says it is reviewing U.S. response to latest proposal
stories.summary: Bulk carrier near Strait of Hormuz reportedly being attacked, U.K. military says

stories.title: Paramilitary forces drone strike kills at least five near Sudan capital: rights group
stories.summary: The Rapid Support Forces, which have been at war with the Sudanese Army for over three years, did not immediately claim the attack

stories.title: Nigerian, Beninese militias kill scores of herders
stories.summary: Security personnel went door-to-door in Fulani herding settlements, arresting young men suspected of being informants for the al-Qaeda-linked Ansaru group, shooting those who resisted

stories.title: Israel court extends detention of two Gaza flotilla activists
Israel strikes southern Lebanon, kills one and wounds rescuers
stories.summary: The warning covered more than 10 villages and towns including several in the district of Nabatieh, which lies north of the Litani River, south of which Israel has stationed troops

stories.title: Russia, Ukraine drones kill four; hit ‘shadow fleet’ tankers
stories.summary: Russia fired 268 drones and one ballistic missile in the overnight attack as Ukraine’s army launched at least 334 drones

stories.title: Between a fatwa and war: how Iran makes sense of its nuclear capability
stories.summary: Iran has ‘vowed’ to protect its nuclear stockpile against Trump’s threats even as its former Ayatollah Ali Khamenei disapproved of using nuclear weapons on religious grounds

stories.title: Sleepless in Tehran as crowds rally behind the flag
stories.summary: A slogan on a wall nearby in Farsi read, “Meydan bashuma, khayabane ba ma”. ‘The battlefield is yours. The streets are ours.’ Addressed to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), it was a message to the soldiers to focus on the battlefield with ordinary Iranians in control of their homes

stories.title: Canada declares Khalistan extremists as ‘national security threat’
stories.summary: The 2025 Public Report of the Canadian Security Intelligence Service comes a year after the 40th anniversary of the bombing of Air India Flight 182, whose suspects were members of the CBKE groups

stories.title: Iran says U.S. military operation ‘impossible’ as Trump mulls peace proposal
stories.summary: The Guards intelligence organisation said that “U.S. President Donald Trump must choose between 'an impossible operation or a bad deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran'", in an online post carried by state television.

stories.title: Sears Tower: Tallest for nearly 25 years, now ranked 25th
stories.summary: Still ranked 25th in the list of tallest buildings, the Sears Tower — completed on May 3, 1973 — was the tallest in the world for nearly 25 years. A.S.Ganesh takes you as close as possible to the tower from this distance, while also revisiting an urban legend about measuring the height of a building…

stories.title: OPEC+ hikes oil production quotas without mentioning UAE pull-out
stories.summary: But raising the quota on paper may not have much impact on actual production, which is already short of the limit

stories.title: Apple says India antitrust body overstepping judicial authority as spat intensifies
stories.summary: The Competition Commission ​of India has since ‌2024 sought Apple’s financial information, typically needed to calculate penalties, after an investigation found it abused its dominant position

stories.title: Israel approves deal to buy fighter jets from U.S.
stories.summary: The purchase includes a squadron of F-35 multi-role stealth fighters from Lockheed Martin and another of F-15IA warplanes from Boeing, the Defence Ministry said.

stories.title: Two killed and 16 injured in attempted channel crossing from France to U.K.
stories.summary: A French maritime gendarmerie vessel rescued 17 people and brought them to Boulogne-sur-Mer, while the makeshift boat ran aground with 65 others still on board

stories.title: Taiwan President defiant as he begins Eswatini trip; China calls him a 'rat'
stories.summary: Lai Ching-te’s despicable conduct — ​like a rat scurrying across the street — will inevitably be met with ridicule by the international community, says China’s Taiwan ‌Affairs Office spokesperson

stories.title: Man suspected of plotting attack on Dutch princesses to appear in court
stories.summary: “The suspect was allegedly in possession of two axes in early February with the words 'Alexia', 'Mossad', and 'Sieg Heil' carved into them, and he allegedly had a handwritten sheet with the words 'Amalia', 'Alexia', and 'Bloodbath,'” says scheduling order

stories.title: Iran executes man convicted over killing of security officer in 2022 unrest
stories.summary: The defendant reportedly confessed ‌to assaulting the security officer

stories.title: Media bodies express concern as India slips in World Press Freedom Index
stories.summary: India has slipped to the 157th place among 180 countries in the 2026 World Press Freedom Index released by Reporters Without Borders, marking a six-place drop from the previous year

stories.title: GalaxEye puts world’s first all-weather imaging OptoSAR satellite in orbit
stories.summary: Weighing 190 kg, it is India’s largest privately developed Earth observation satellite and the first globally to integrate Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) and electro-optical (EO) sensors on a single platform.

stories.title: NEET 2026: Over 1 lakh students appear for exam across Tamil Nadu
stories.summary: NEET results expected in June, 2026

stories.title: Gujarat high court’s upholds provision linking ITC for recipient to actual tax payment by supplier
stories.summary: While this ruling reinforces a strict interpretation of tax laws, the Court also acknowledged the “disproportionate financial and administrative burdens” this places on honest buyers

stories.title: From cool haven to heat stress: Urbanisation heats up Bengaluru; no immediate water crisis this year though
stories.summary: “The worrying factor is that the minimum temperature has gone up, and the duration of heat has extended,” said Viswanath Srikantaiah, founder of Rainwater Club

stories.title: India may take middle path, unlikely to remove import duty on cotton
stories.summary: Options under a middle path could be either zero duty import in September-October as current stock in the country is comfortable to meet domestic, or reduce import duty to 6-7% from the current 11%

stories.title: DMK urges CEO, DGP to ensure peaceful vote counting amid disruption fears
stories.summary: DMK says it has received ‘credible information’ suggesting that the Bharatiya Janata Party, along with other parties allegedly acting at its instance, may attempt to disrupt proceedings at counting centres

stories.title: Summer in Srinagar, winter in Jammu: What is Kashmir’s 150-year-old practice of ‘Darbar Move’?
stories.summary: The Civil Secretariat, the seat of the Jammu and Kashmir government, will reopen in Srinagar on Monday -- a week after closing in Jammu

stories.title: Bengaluru start-up’s satellite launched aboard SpaceX rocket: What is Mission Drishti?
stories.summary: Bengaluru-based space start-up GalaxEye says Mission Drishti is the world’s first OptoSAR satellite, integrating electro-optical (EO) and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) sensors into a single operational platform

stories.title: Kerala poll turnout rises to 79.70% after inclusion of service voters’ postal ballots: CEO
stories.summary: The chief electoral officer said 53,984 postal ballots had been issued to service voters, of which 20,028 had been received as of May 1

stories.title: Listed realty firms tighten grip on land deals as market consolidates in FY26
stories.summary: Listed players represented 49% of land deals in FY2026, up from 40% in FY2025

stories.title: OPEC+ set to agree third oil output quota hike since Hormuz closure, sources say
stories.summary:
The move is designed to show the group is ready to raise
supplies once the war stops

stories.title: Cabinet to soon approve ₹37,500 cr incentive scheme to promote coal gasification projects
stories.summary: The coal ministry has already prepared a Cabinet note on the scheme to promote coal gasification projects, with a financial outlay of ₹37,500 crore

stories.title: Telangana Govt to release ₹6000 cr pending retirement benefits soon
stories.summary: Stating that the State’s revenues, including GST collections, were on the rise, CM said the government would be in a position to consider other demands of employees from time to time

stories.title: EC releases TN voter turnout; 4.87 crore votes polled in Assembly elections
stories.summary: Of these, 2,52,59,596 were female voters, and 2,35,34,720 were male voters

stories.title: Fuel distribution in the country remains stable: Union Minister
stories.summary: As international crude prices surge, Union Minister Pralhad Joshi defends the government’s fuel distribution stability amid sharp criticism from opposition parties over soaring commercial gas cylinder costs

stories.title: Reviewing fresh Iran proposal, can resume strikes if they misbehave: Trump
stories.summary: The US President said he was looking at the new proposal sent by Iran on the plane and would talk to the media in Miami

stories.title: Tirupati laddu ghee scandal: Panel flags adulteration, lapses
stories.summary: The report highlights systemic failures, including dilution of FSSAI testing norms, suppression of lab reports, and irregularities in tender processes

stories.title: EC orders fresh poll in all 285 booths of Falta Assembly seat on May 21
stories.summary: The move comes amid earlier re-poll orders in select booths of other constituencies during the ongoing Assembly elections.

stories.title: FinMin notifies changes in FEMA rules easing FDI for foreign cos with up to 10% Chinese stake
stories.summary: New FEMA rules clear low-level China-linked FDI under automatic route
